contract_meta.rationale: Phase 3B integrates multi-turn tooling into execute flow and adds UI repair history display. Win #26 is UI work - recommend delegation to friend per established pattern.
contract_meta.delegation_note: Win #26 (UI repair history) recommended for friend/assistant due to UI danger zone pattern from Phase 2

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Integrate multi-turn repair into execute flow, add UI repair history visualization, capture repair metrics in telemetry. Complete Phase 3.

delegation_recommendation.win_26_ui_work: Recommend friend handles this per Phase 2B pattern
delegation_recommendation.wins_24_25_27: Backend work, safe for primary developer

execution_model.description: Agent verifies Phase 3A completion, integrates multi-turn loop, adds UI, captures metrics.

ui_work_protocol.if_developer_executes_26: Apply strict scope limits from Phase 2B UI protocol

observability.description: Enhanced repair observability with multi-attempt tracking

tasks.title: Verify Phase 3A completion
tasks.description: Confirm Phase 3A foundation tools are complete before Phase 3B integration

evaluation.intent: Verify Phase 3A tooling complete before integration
evaluation.success_criteria: All Phase 3A artifacts exist and tests pass
evaluation.on_fail: HALT - Phase 3A must be complete before Phase 3B

tasks.title: Win #24: Multi-Turn Repair Loop
tasks.description: Create multiTurnRepair.ts that orchestrates up to 4 repair attempts using Phase 3A tools

content_spec.function_signature: export async function multiTurnRepair(context: MultiTurnContext): Promise<RepairHistory>
loop_logic: Initialize repair-history with attempt #1 (existing single repair from Phase 1)
Loop up to 3 additional times (max 4 total):
- Parse LLM response for file changes
- If status === 'pass': set successAttemptNumber, break early
- If attempt 4 and still failing: set finalStatus = 'exhausted'
Return complete RepairHistory validated against schema
content_spec.early_termination: Stop immediately on first successful test run, don't waste attempts
content_spec.error_handling: Catch LLM errors, file write errors, test execution errors - record in attempt, continue to next if attempts remain

test_cases: success on attempt 2 - stops early, sets successAttemptNumber
success on attempt 4 - uses all attempts
all 4 attempts exhausted - finalStatus = 'exhausted'
early termination works - doesn't run attempt 4 if 3 passes
error handling - LLM error doesn't crash loop
repair history structure valid - passes schema validation
cumulative time increases correctly
previous attempt context passed to buildRepairPrompt

success_criteria: Correctly orchestrates up to 4 repair attempts

demo_requirement.manual_test: Mock repair scenarios with varying success points, verify early termination
demo_requirement.approval_needed: Developer confirms loop logic handles all scenarios correctly

tasks.title: Win #25: Integrate Multi-Turn into Execute
tasks.description: Replace single-repair call in /api/execute with multiTurnRepair loop

ensure: After initial test failure, call multiTurnRepair instead of repairOnce
Update response schema to include repairHistory field
Maintain backward compatibility - existing testResults field still present
Return complete repair-history showing all attempts
Handle case where initial test passes (no repair needed)

test_cases: execute with initial pass - no repair attempts
execute with single repair success - repairHistory has 1 attempt
execute with multi-turn success - repairHistory shows progression
execute with all attempts exhausted - repairHistory shows 4 attempts
response includes both testResults and repairHistory
backward compatibility - existing execute tests still pass

success_criteria: API response includes complete repair history
All test cases pass including existing ones

demo_requirement.manual_test: POST to /api/execute with failing prompt, verify multi-turn repair runs

tasks.title: Win #26: Update UI to Show Repair History
tasks.description: Add UI repair history display showing multi-turn repair attempts with timeline

delegation.rationale: UI work is acknowledged danger zone. Friend handled Phase 2B UI successfully.
delegation.if_developer_executes: Apply strict scope limits from Phase 2B: functional only, no styling polish, no features beyond spec

ensure: Add expandable section for repair attempts
Basic CSS for timeline layout (functional only)
Highlight successful attempt or show 'All attempts exhausted'
Progressive color coding (yellow → green for success, yellow → red for exhaustion)

success_criteria: Repair history section appears in results
All attempts shown with correct status
Early termination visible (doesn't show attempts 3-4 if passed at 2)
Layout functional (doesn't need to be polished)

demo_requirement.manual_test: Generate projects with varying repair scenarios, verify UI shows history correctly
demo_requirement.approval_needed: Developer AND wife/friend review - confirm functional, no scope creep

forbidden: Styling beyond basic layout and colors
Any features not explicitly in win spec

tasks.title: Win #27: Add Repair Metrics to Telemetry
tasks.description: Update _executor_meta.json to include detailed repair metrics for analytics

ensure: Structure: {totalAttempts, successAttempt?, timePerAttempt: [], failureTypes: [], exhausted: boolean, attemptEfficiency: number}
When repair completes, calculate metrics from RepairHistory

test_cases: meta includes repair metrics when repair used
attemptEfficiency calculated correctly
timePerAttempt array has correct length
failureTypes captured from failure analysis
exhausted flag set correctly
meta correct when no repair needed

success_criteria: Meta file includes complete repair metrics

demo_requirement.manual_test: Generate project with multi-turn repair, verify _executor_meta.json includes metrics
demo_requirement.approval_needed: Developer confirms metrics useful for future analytics

tasks.title: Phase 3 Complete - Final Validation Gate
tasks.description: Final validation that entire Phase 3 (Multi-Turn Repair) is complete and production-ready

actions.description: End-to-end Phase 3 validation with 20 varied prompts
test_scenarios: Task that passes initially (no repair needed)
Verify UI shows repair history correctly
Verify meta file includes repair metrics

evaluation.intent: Confirm entire Phase 3 (Multi-Turn Repair) is production-ready
evaluation.success_criteria: All tests pass, multi-turn repair works end-to-end, success rate >80%, UI functional, metrics captured
evaluation.on_pass: PHASE 3 COMPLETE - System handles complex tasks with bounded multi-turn repair. Ready for Phase 4 decision.
evaluation.on_fail: HALT - Fix issues before declaring Phase 3 complete

phase_3_completion_metrics.success_rate: >80% of standard tasks green within 4 attempts
phase_3_completion_metrics.early_termination: Stops on first success, doesn't waste attempts

win_isolation.description: Each win must be complete, tested, and DEMOED before proceeding to next
win_isolation.implementation: Run tests after each win. Manual demo required for all wins.

P3-GATE.on_fail: HALT execution. Fix issues before declaring Phase 3 complete.
P3-GATE.report: Generate comprehensive Phase 3 completion report with success metrics.

delegation_protocol.win_26_ui: Recommend friend handles this per established pattern
delegation_protocol.developer_option: If developer insists on executing Win #26, apply strict Phase 2B UI scope limits

fallback_policies.phase3a_verification_fails: HALT - Phase 3A must be complete before 3B.
fallback_policies.test_fails: Fix implementation, do not skip tests.
fallback_policies.coverage_drops: Add tests to maintain >80% coverage before proceeding.
fallback_policies.success_rate_below_80: Analyze failures, improve failure analysis or repair prompts, re-test.
fallback_policies.ui_scope_creep: Remove additions or defer to future phase. Stick to functional spec only.

release_actions.cmd: git commit -m "feat(phase3): complete multi-turn repair - bounded 4-attempt loop, UI history, metrics"

post_release_celebration.rationale: Phase 3 is major capability milestone. System now handles complex tasks with up to 4 repair attempts. Expected >80% success rate on standard tasks.
requirements: Full day off with wife and kids
Discuss Phase 4 decision together when refreshed (not today)
Consider: continue to Phase 4 OR implement Phase 4.5 (production hardening) OR extended break

ai_executor_guidelines.observability_first: Trace all decisions. Log reasoning for each win completion.
ai_executor_guidelines.win_isolation: Complete and test each win fully before proceeding to next.
ai_executor_guidelines.delegation_awareness: Win #26 is UI work. Recommend friend handles per established pattern.
ai_executor_guidelines.test_driven: Write comprehensive tests for multi-turn loop and integration.
ai_executor_guidelines.fail_fast: If any test fails, halt and fix before proceeding.
ai_executor_guidelines.gate_enforcement: P3-GATE is Phase 3 completion - requires 20-prompt validation and >80% success rate.
ai_executor_guidelines.success_metrics: Track and report: average attempts to success, exhaustion rate, most common failures.

governance_note.for_human: Phase 3B completes multi-turn repair. Wins 24-25-27 are backend (safe for you). Win 26 is UI (recommend friend handles per Phase 2B pattern). After P3-GATE passes, Phase 3 is COMPLETE. Major milestone. Take full day off. Celebrate with family. Then decide: Phase 4 (planning/monitoring) OR Phase 4.5 (production hardening from assistant's list) OR extended break. No pressure to continue immediately.
